title: WarriorSplits
description: A in-game timer for speedrunning Parkour Warrior on MCCI!
body:
A mod for [MCC Island](https://mcchampionship.com/)'s Parkour Warrior adding an in-game speedrun timer.

No setup required at all, install the mod and enjoy the timer in the right top of your screen. The mod will automatically detect which course you are on.

## Commands
* `/timer start` Starts the timer.
* `/timer split` Moves to the next segment.
* `/timer reset` Resets the timer.
* `/timer setcourse <course>` Manually overrides the course.
* `/timer setcomparison <pb|gold>` Sets your comparison run to either your personal best or your ideal run on a per-obstacle basis.

## Save files
Your times get stored in JSON files in your config folder. You can find it at `%appdata%/.minecraft/config/warriorsplits`. There'll be a month folder in which for each month all the courses get stored. You shouldn't have to edit these manually.
